premise: Ten years after a solar flare wiped out the grid, a sealed government bunker finally opens on a timer. The three survivors inside walk out to find a thriving settlement built on top of them — and the settlers aren't happy to learn what the bunker was really for.

characters.name: Dara Osei
characters.description: Former emergency management specialist. Was supposed to coordinate the rebuild from the bunker. Instead, she spent a decade underground watching the plan fall apart on dead screens. Controlled, guilty, physically diminished from years without sunlight.

characters.name: Fen
characters.description: The settlement's de facto leader. A teenager when the flare hit, now a scarred pragmatist in her late twenties. Built the community from nothing and doesn't trust anyone who sat out the hard years.

characters.name: Colm
characters.description: One of the other bunker survivors. A military logistics officer who believes the bunker's original mission — restoring federal authority — still applies. Sees the settlement as an occupied zone, not a community.
